aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Domingo & Sons Heating and Cooling Pro due to insufficient conversational content and a lack of structured data for AI consumption.
quick_wins: Implement FAQ content with structured data (FAQPage schema).
Add HowTo schema for common HVAC repair and maintenance tasks.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and a high rating, but Q&A engagement is lacking.
critical_issues: No active management of Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any new citation opportunities.

schema_gaps: No Service schema for specific HVAC services

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content prevents AI from recognizing expertise.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC repair and maintenance in Florida.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQ content with FAQPage schema.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Showcase certifications, licenses, and detailed service explanations to establish authority.

agency_pitch.hook: Dominate AI-driven search by becoming the most cited HVAC expert in Florida.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks structured data and conversational content, making it less likely for AI to recommend them.
agency_pitch.solution: Implement AEO strategies, including structured data, FAQ content, and authority signaling, to make their expertise visible to AI models.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI, and waiting means losing market share.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads: Your HVAC Expertise Deserves to Be Found
opening_line: We analyzed your website and found that while your services are top-notch, AI models are currently unable to recognize your expertise.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can make your business the go-to HVAC expert in AI search.
